intake.user_request: Enable CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG integration: wire the semantic header RAG index into /create-workorder so workorder planning is seeded with relevant files, patterns, and constraints from the indexed graph. 125 chunks are now indexed (header gate PASSING after WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-001). Goal: /create-workorder --discovery-rag flag (or env var) surfaces semantic context from rag-index during workorder scoping.

classification.plan_type_rationale: Classifier returned light (Rule 6 fallthrough), overridden to phased: wiring spans multiple layers (discovery_rag.py helper, create-workorder orchestration, context.json persistence, SKILL.md update) and requires a Phase 1 verification gate before Phase 2 implementation begins. Phase 2 is a hard stop.

in_scope: Wire CODEREF_LLOYD_DISCOVERY_RAG env var check into /create-workorder Step 3.6 execution layer
Call /coderef-rag-server status as pre-flight check before enrich_with_rag()
Invoke enrich_with_rag(goal, project_dir, target_root) from discovery_rag.py
Persist discovery_rag result to context.json under discovery_rag key (all required fields)
Handle fallback scenarios: vectors_missing, vectors_stale, Lloyd unreachable
Write RAG-DISCOVERY-STEP.md reference doc (the spec referenced by SKILL.md but not yet created)
Test fallback path (vectors missing / Lloyd unavailable)
Verify create-workorder skill.json reads list includes discovery_rag.py
out_of_scope: CODEREF-CORE infrastructure changes (RAG server, CLI, vector store all complete)
execute-workorder validator consuming discovery_rag from context.json (future workorder)
Automatic reindex trigger (fallback logs a suggestion; no auto-rebuild)
CODEREF_LLOYD_CLASSIFIER flag wiring (separate flag, already partially wired)
RAG index rebuild (125 chunks indexed from WO-SOURCE-HEADERS-RESTAMP-001)

constraints: RAG is enrichment NOT a gate — fallback_used=true must never block /create-workorder
Do not shell out to hardcoded rag-server bin path — use /coderef-rag-server skill for lifecycle ops
discovery_rag.py module must not be modified — it is complete; only the caller (create-workorder orchestration) is wired
SKILL.md Step 3.6 pseudocode already specifies the contract — implementation must match it exactly

errors: semantic_scan extraction skipped for phased plan with ASSISTANT-layer target
